article_meta.title: Immigration Here's Where You Can Report Illegal Alien Truck Drivers Before They Kill More Americans By: Breccan F

reasoning: The model correctly classifies this article as Right with high confidence (0.98), which is appropriate given the extremely strong and consistent right-leaning editorial choices throughout the article. The key_indicators all cite the author's own prose, not quoted material. The reasoning is thorough and evidence-grounded. No attribution rule violations are present.

custom_reasoning.classification_accuracy: The article is from The Federalist, and the author's own prose is saturated with right-leaning editorial choices: 'illegal aliens' used consistently, blame attributed to Democratic governors by name, 'every death at the hands of an illegal alien could have been prevented,' etc. Right classification is exactly correct.
custom_reasoning.confidence_calibration: 0.98 confidence is well-calibrated for an article with unambiguous, consistent right-leaning signals throughout every paragraph of the author's prose. This is among the clearest possible cases.
custom_reasoning.reasoning_evidence_quality: All five key_indicators are from the author's own prose. 'Fraudulent and lax enforcement...' is authorial editorial language. 'Every death at the hands of an illegal alien could have been prevented...' is the author's own statement. The quoted material from Banks and Duffy is correctly excluded from the key_indicators. No attribution violations.
